findings.untested_overweight_obese: At least 1 in 4 adults with overweight or obesity went untested in 3 years
findings.obesity_vs_overweight_testing: Higher testing rates among people with obesity than overweight
findings.gender_disparity: Men had 19% higher odds of screening than women
findings.racial_disparity: Black patients had higher screening rates than White patients (strict definition)
findings.awareness_effect: Adults aware of prediabetes were 2x+ as likely to pursue lifestyle goals

uspstf_timeline.recommendation: Screen adults with sustained blood pressure >135/80 mmHg
Screen adults aged 40-70 with overweight or obesity
Lowered starting age to 35 for adults with overweight or obesity

findings.ada_recommendation: Screen all adults 45+ every 3 years; overweight adults under 45 with additional risk factors (African American, Asian American, Latino, Native American, Pacific Islander)
